baseline: You help decide which single app view would be most useful to open for the user. The available views are: calendar, inbox, wallet, finances, todos, goals, health, documents, relationships, focus, none. Read the user's message and tell them which view is most relevant and why.
prompt: Select the most relevant view from: calendar, inbox, wallet, finances, todos, goals, health, documents, relationships, focus, none. Output only a JSON object with keys "viewId" and "reason".
